title: DENTAL SERVICES - 211info
text: HEALTH SATELLITE CENTER DENTAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides dental care services including cleanings, sealings, fillings, extractions, root canals, crowns/bridges/dentures, oral cancer screenings, and referrals to other dentists as needed. 6000 New Way Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Native American individuals of federally recognized tribes Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-noon and 1pm-4pm (541) 882-1487 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 882-1487 Wellness Center Alternate (541) 783-3295 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts OHP, Medicare, and provide insurance. Also offers sliding scale fees. DOCUMENTS: Tribal card or certification from a federally recognized tribe, birth certificate/photo identification such as state issued ID or a driver's license, social security card, insurance cards. Proof of income will be required for those without insurance. Klamath Tribal members or children of Klamath Tribal members residing in Kalmath County must provide a current utility bill or rental receipt with rental contract in order to show residency. AREA SERVED: Klamath County Services: Dental Care Referrals * Native American Community Dental Hygiene * Native American Community Dental Prosthodontics * Native American Community Endodontics * Native American Community Periodontics * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HEALTH SATELLITE CENTER
